metadata.description: Creator — Executive Dashboard Architect that turns a raw uploaded data file into a polished, executive-ready dashboard built on the SDR Interactive Dashboard Template (V16).

plugins.name: creator
plugins.description: Profiles an uploaded data file (ITSM, FTE/billing, service performance, team/HR, or mixed) and populates the fixed sections and component library of the bundled SDR V16 template with real values, delivering a single self-contained interactive HTML dashboard. Preserves the Bumblebee Copilot panel and XLSX upload feature.
